beer.beer_description:
Come, join us.

Take your place by the fire.

Let the pulsating glow warm you. Let go.
Pour this hazy elixir into your goblet and let the aromas overtake you.

Give yourself over to the promises of a tropical vision

Take a sip, drink it in.

Cashmere is friendship, Motueka growth. Centennial is inclusivity, Strata loyalty.

Soon spirits of melons and passionfruits will surround you in spiralling halos. Soon clouds
of lemons and limes will catch you.

Welcome.

items.checkin_comment: I get grapefruit passionfruit lemon but then again I don’t have many melons. Quite like it tbh

user.bio: Love trying all the different beers, and dont mind a good scotch. Ratings are mine on style and taste for that style.
Chef/Storeman , sneaker collector, vinyl head, craft beer bloke! Portland Blazers n Ess. Bomber!

items.badge_description: What happens when you take two or more amazing breweries, throw them into the tank and let them ferment together? An amazing collaboration beer, that’s what! Cheers to working together to create the perfect flavor. That's 60 different beers that have been brewed as a collaboration. Try 5 more for Level 13!

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 300 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 61!

items.checkin_comment: Passionfruit citrus and stone fruit flavours. Soft and juicy full mouthfeel. Low bitterness. Tasty!

items.checkin_comment: This is nice but not as intense or complex as some other MCB beers I’ve had lately. Melon and a slight peach note on the nose which follows through on the palate alongside passionfruit and an interesting lemon lime finish. Smooth but lacking complexity.
